Paper_Name: Quality of Life Assessment and Practice Support System randomized trial
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Patient MQOL-E at one year; caregiver QOLLTI-F secondary
Statistical_Model: Longitudinal structural equation model with missing-at-random handling
Review_Notes: Paper reports model-based one-year intervention effects; compact cleaned endpoint/delta summaries do not reproduce the longitudinal SEM target.

Paper_Name: MobileCoach physical activity financial incentives randomized trial
Sample_Size_Paper: 96 in effectiveness analysis; 65 in goal-tailoring primary subset
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Number of days, from 0 to 20, that the tailored step goal was achieved
Statistical_Model: Restricted effectiveness analysis with exclusions for untailored goals and selected participants
Review_Notes: The source includes syntax for the paper filter, but the compact cleaned data do not contain all paper filter variables and include 133 participants.

Paper_Name: Effects of copper intrauterine device versus levonorgestrel intrauterine system on genital HIV viral load
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Detectable genital HIV viral load at 6 and 24 months
Review_Notes: Cleaned data contain the gVL outcomes, but the paper primary target is an adjusted longitudinal odds ratio not reproduced by the compact audit.

Paper_Name: Monitoring PrEP in Young Adult women randomized trial
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: PrEP adherence over 24 months by real-time electronic monitoring
Statistical_Model: Negative binomial models adjusted for site and quarterly visit among PrEP collectors
Review_Notes: The paper primary target is visit-level longitudinal adherence; the preliminary cleaned table keeps a compact final adherence percentage.

Paper_Name: Aprepitant for prevention of postoperative nausea and vomiting after laparoscopic sleeve gastrectomy
Arms_Paper: 3 source arms; paper combines aprepitant arms
Review_Notes: The paper's 24-hour nausea/PONV counts reproduce from nonmissing source outcomes after combining aprepitant dose arms.

Paper_Name: Effect of Tocovid on postoperative atrial fibrillation after CABG
Review_Notes: The overall POAF event count and rate reproduce exactly from the cleaned binary outcome.

Paper_Name: Randomized comparative effectiveness trial of MyPlate versus calorie counting among Latino adults
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Satiation/satiety, body weight, and waist circumference
Cleaned_Primary_Outcome: Patient-centered survey outcomes; weight and waist outcomes
Review_Notes: Arm labels were verified in the codebook, but the paper's adjusted weight target is not reproduced by simple cleaned means.

Paper_Name: Immersive virtual reality exposure for reducing preoperative anxiety in children
Review_Notes: I found dataset and registry information but no associated main results publication, so no primary-publication audit can be completed.

Paper_Name: Effects of a web-based evolutionary mismatch-framed intervention targeting physical activity and diet
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Daily physical activity level and total energy intake at 12 weeks
Statistical_Model: ANCOVA/adjusted mean difference with descriptive change summaries
Review_Notes: Primary PAL and total-energy-intake change summaries reproduce the table values; one near-zero rounded PAL row is flagged by strict 5 percent tolerance.

Paper_Name: Feasibility, usability and acceptance of Brain-IT pilot feasibility RCT
Sample_Size_Paper: 18 included; 16 randomized into usual care/exergame in current cleaned file
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Recruitment, attrition, adherence, compliance, SUS, and acceptance feasibility outcomes
Review_Notes: The current cleaned file uses secondary cognitive Qmci outcomes and excludes two feasibility records; it needs recleaning around the paper primary feasibility outcomes.

Paper_Name: Bouldering psychotherapy is not inferior to cognitive behavioural therapy in the group treatment of depression
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Depressive symptom severity assessed by MADRS and PHQ-9
Review_Notes: MADRS primary pre/post/change targets reproduce within tolerance; one PHQ-9 CBT change row is outside the strict 5 percent tolerance.

Paper_Name: Virtual reality neuroscience therapy for chronic back pain
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Brief Pain Inventory average pain intensity after treatment
Statistical_Model: Group comparisons of clinical pain outcomes
Review_Notes: Baseline and post-treatment BPI average pain means and SDs reproduce the reported table values.

Paper_Name: VIBRANT trial primary and secondary outcomes
Sample_Size_Paper: 96 randomized participants; 71 active mITT in primary detection target
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Detection of L. crispatus LBP strains by metagenomic sequencing in first five weeks
Statistical_Model: Primary safety and microbiome detection summaries
Review_Notes: The active-arm mITT count 47 of 71 reproduces the preprint primary microbiome detection target.

Paper_Name: Acceptance lowers stress reactivity: Dismantling mindfulness training in a randomized controlled trial
Primary_Outcome_From_Publication: Stress reactivity, especially log cortisol AUC-I after mTSST
Statistical_Model: Condition comparisons with EM estimation and covariate adjustment
Review_Notes: Control and monitor-only cortisol means are close, but the Monitor + Accept AUC-I target does not reproduce from the compact cleaned data.
